title: Aizawl、Mizoram — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Aizawl、Mizoram的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Aizawl是Mizoram的一个城市，人口约400,000。The capital of Mizoram, a hill city in northeast India known for its high literacy rate, scenic landscapes, and vibrant tribal culture.
